stream_summary: Integration tests for saga execution with step-specific configs. Verifies end-to-end functionality and backward compatibility.

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Step definition can include optional 'agent_config' field pointing to a config file
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step.json with 'agent_config': 'agent-config.json', When the step is executed, Then DevinWrapper uses that config file

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: If step has no agent_config, fall back to global .devin/agent-config.json
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step.json without 'agent_config' field, When the step is executed, Then DevinWrapper uses .devin/agent-config.json

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Validation ensures agent_config file exists if specified
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step.json with agent_config pointing to non-existent file, When saga validation runs, Then validation fails with clear error message

related_edge_cases.criterion: Given no global .devin/agent-config.json and step has no agent_config, When step executes, Then error indicates missing config

related_edge_cases.case: Both step-specific and global config exist
related_edge_cases.criterion: Given both configs exist, When step executes, Then step-specific config is used

related_edge_cases.case: Agent config file is not readable (permission denied)
related_edge_cases.criterion: Given agent-config.json with no read permissions, When step executes, Then error indicates permission issue

stream_steps.title: Create Test Fixtures
stream_steps.description: Set up test steps and configurations for integration testing
tasks: Create test step with invalid config path
Create test step with absolute config path
Create test sagas using these steps
Set up test data and fixtures
acceptance_criteria: Fixtures can be reused across tests

stream_steps.title: Write Integration Tests
stream_steps.description: Integration tests for saga execution with step-specific configs
tasks: Test saga execution with step-specific config
Test saga validation with missing config file
Test saga validation with valid config file
Test backward compatibility with existing steps
Test with multiple steps (some with, some without agent_config)

stream_steps.title: Verify Backward Compatibility
stream_steps.description: Run full test suite to ensure no regressions

relevant_context.relevance: Example step that can be used as template for test fixtures
Existing sagas that can be used for integration testing
Testing framework used in the project

success_criteria: Saga execution works with step-specific configs
notes: Integration testing is critical for verifying end-to-end functionality. Must complete before documentation phase.
